description: A horizontal memorial graphic. At the left, an ICE badge emblem appears above the words Wall of Honor, with text below reading Senior Special Agent Paul Douglas Ice, End of Watch, Wednesday, April 19, 1995. The center holds a portrait photograph of a man in a dark suit, and the right side shows a U.S. flag and a bouquet of red roses.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Senior Special Agent Paul Douglas Ice; End of Watch; Wednesday, April 19, 1995
